name: acme_eval
description: Unified eval dataset for Acme Corp Q3 2024 earnings transcript. Used by both retrieval evals (precision/recall/MRR) and transcript evals (faithfulness/relevance/completeness). Ingest eval_data/acme_q3_2024_transcript.json first.

cases.name: revenue_guidance
cases.query: What is Acme Corp's full-year revenue guidance for 2024?
cases.expected_answer: Full-year revenue guidance is $1.62 billion to $1.65 billion (unchanged).

cases.name: q4_revenue_range
cases.query: What Q4 revenue range did Acme expect?
cases.expected_answer: Q4 revenue is expected to be $435 million to $448 million, implying 15% to 18% growth.

cases.name: ceo_ai_investment
cases.query: How much is Acme investing in AI this year and when will AI contribute to revenue?
cases.expected_answer: Roughly $50 million in AI infrastructure and talent this year; AI-driven features expected to contribute meaningfully to revenue in the first half of 2025.

cases.name: operating_margin
cases.query: What was Acme's Q3 non-GAAP operating margin and how did it change?
cases.expected_answer: Non-GAAP operating margin for Q3 was 24%, up 200 basis points year over year.

cases.name: cash_position
cases.query: How much cash and equivalents did Acme have at the end of Q3?
cases.expected_answer: Acme ended the quarter with $1.2 billion in cash and equivalents.

cases.name: enterprise_logos
cases.query: How many new enterprise logos did Acme add in Q3?
cases.expected_answer: 120 new enterprise logos were added in Q3.

cases.name: dso_improvement
cases.query: What drove the DSO improvement and what is the target?
cases.expected_answer: Tightened payment terms on new enterprise contracts and higher mix of upfront annual deals. Target is DSO in the high 30s by end of FY25.

cases.name: emea_win_rate
cases.query: What was Acme's win rate in head-to-head deals in Q3?
cases.expected_answer: Win rate in head-to-head deals was 64% in Q3, up from 58% last quarter.

cases.name: international_growth
cases.query: What was Acme's international growth by region in Q3?
cases.expected_answer: EMEA was up 28%, APAC ex-China was up 22%, and China was up 8%.

cases.name: ai_copilot_pricing
cases.query: What premium does Acme charge for the AI Copilot tier?
cases.expected_answer: Acme charges a 15% premium for the AI tier.

cases.name: sales_rep_adds
cases.query: How many sales reps did Acme add in Q3 and what are the plans for Q4?
cases.expected_answer: 45 reps in Q3, plan to add another 30 in Q4, primarily in EMEA and APAC.

cases.name: gross_margin_path
cases.query: What did David Park say about the path to 80% gross margin?
cases.expected_answer: Gross margin expansion from mix shift toward enterprise and platform services, efficiency gains in cloud infrastructure, and pricing on renewals. Clear path over 18 to 24 months.

cases.name: china_revenue
cases.query: What percentage of Acme's revenue comes from China?
cases.expected_answer: China is 6% of total revenue, down from 8% a year ago.

cases.name: stock_repurchase
cases.query: How much stock did Acme repurchase in Q3?
cases.expected_answer: Acme repurchased $25 million of stock in Q3.

cases.name: opex_guidance
cases.query: What Q4 OpEx growth did the CFO guide?
cases.expected_answer: Q4 non-GAAP OpEx up roughly 12% to 15% year over year, driven by sales and R&D hires.

cases.name: speaker_attribution
cases.query: Who gave the margin expansion drivers and what did they say?
